title: ornithogalum duthiae
intro: Ornithogalum duthiae, also known as Duthie's star flower or the Indian star flower, is a plant species in the lily family (Asparagaceae) that is native to the Himalayas. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ornithogalum duthiae include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
